§6Signalum-Plated Itemduct§f

§aMid-tier itemduct with combined speed boost and enhanced throughput for busy transport networks!§f

The §bSignalum-Plated Itemduct§f is a mid-tier itemduct that fuses the §bImpulse Itemduct§f speed boost with §bSignalum§f's enhanced capacity. It is ideal for busy main trunk lines between processing areas.

§6Speed & Capacity§f:
§b• Speed§f: Faster than Impulse Itemduct.
§b• Capacity§f: Higher throughput per tick.

§6Routing Behavior§f:
Like all itemducts, items take the shortest path. Signalum-Plated Itemducts can be paired with §bFilters§f and §bServos§f to create high-throughput routed networks.

§eTip§f: Use §bSignalum-Plated Itemducts§f in your main trunk lines between processing areas, and standard §bItemducts§f on short feeder branches. This balances cost against throughput for the busiest segments only.
